NetSparkleUpdater.​Downloaders.​WebFileDownloader
NetSparkleUpdater.​Interfaces.​IUpdateDownloader
IDisposable
public
NetSparkleUpdater.​Downloaders.​WebFileDownloader

Class that downloads files from the internet and reports progress on those files being downloaded. Uses a object as its main method for downloading.

Variables
_httpClient
private HttpClient? _httpClient
_logger
private ILogger? _logger
_cts
private CancellationTokenSource? _cts
_downloadFileLocation
private string? _downloadFileLocation
_fileStream
private FileStream? _fileStream
Functions
WebFileDownloader
public WebFileDownloader()

Default constructor for the web client file downloader.

WebFileDownloader
public WebFileDownloader(
ILogger? 
logger
)

Constructor for the web file downloader that takes an  instance.

Parameter
logger
ILogger?

ILogger to write logs to

Properties
LogWriter
public ILogger? LogWriter {
set;
get
}

ILogger to log data from WebFileDownloader

RedirectHandler
public RedirectHandler? RedirectHandler {
get;
set
}

Set this to handle redirects that manually, e.g. redirects that go from HTTPS to HTTP (which are not allowed by default)

TrustEverySSLConnection
public bool TrustEverySSLConnection {
get;
set
}

If true, don't check the validity of SSL certificates. Defaults to false.

Functions
PrepareToDownloadFile
public virtual void PrepareToDownloadFile()

Do preparation work necessary to download a file, aka set up the HttpClient for use.

protected virtual HttpClient CreateHttpClient()

Create the HttpClient used for file downloads

Returns

The client used for file downloads

HttpClientHandler? 
handler

Create the HttpClient used for file downloads (with nullable handler)

handler
